title: Everbloom Vale
description: The Everbloom Vale modpack for a slightly modded minecraft experience
body:
![Everbloom Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f8549d5391651a48c0f9dc37ce4925d69c3bf892.png)



**A modpack designed for RPG, Magic, Cooking and More!**


---


The Everbloom Vale modpack aims to provide a Minecraft experience of **Fantasy, RPG, Magic, Cooking and Expressiveness.**

I worked on this mod after hours of research and after receiving feedback from players in order to make the experience optimized for anyone who wants to experience and a fun and beautiful Minecraft experience.

Many quality-of-life and visual enhancements mods are included by default in the pack - you can add or remove any client-side mods you would like.



<details>
<summary>Included Major mods</summary>

- https://modrinth.com/mod/adorable-hamster-pets [Adorable Hamster Pets]
- https://modrinth.com/mod/ars-elixirum[Ars Elixirum]
- https://modrinth.com/mod/boks-butterflies[Bok's Banging Butterflies]
- https://modrinth.com/mod/bossesrise[Bosses'Rise]
- https://modrinth.com/mod/calypsos-candy-workshop[Calypso's Candy Workshop]
- https://modrinth.com/mod/create[Create]
- https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons[Distant Horizons]
- https://modrinth.com/mod/dungeons-and-taverns[Dungeons and Taverns]
- https://modrinth.com/mod/ecologics[Ecologics]
- https://modrinth.com/mod/exposure[Exposure]
- https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-aircraft[Immersive Aircraft]
- https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-furniture[Immersive Furniture]
- https://modrinth.com/mod/mowzies-mobs[Mowzie's Mobs]
- https://modrinth.com/mod/toxony[Toxony]
- https://modrinth.com/mod/tempad[Tempad]
- https://modrinth.com/mod/travelersbackpack[Traveler's Backpack]
- https://modrinth.com/mod/arsenal-rpg-series[RPG Series]

</details>

---


<details>
<summary>Included Shader Packs</summary>

- https://modrinth.com/shader/bliss-shader[Bliss Shaders]
- Complementary Shaders
- MakeUp - Ultra Fast
- Super Duper Vanilla

</details>

---
**The Modpack is still in developement!**

Expect frequent updates, tweaks and tinkering in the future for the goal of optimizing the experience.





---

**All credits of the mods themselves are to the original owners!**
